title: India's Coal-Derived Electricity Production Remains Strong
section_path: India's Coal-Derived Electricity Production Remains Strong
section_path_text: India's Coal-Derived Electricity Production Remains Strong
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
India's electricity production has stayed strong in recent months and has continued to experience significant year-on-year growth despite the nation's recent surge in new coronavirus cases. Most recently, India produced approximately 104 billion kilowatt hours of electricity in May. This has marked a month-on-month decline of 11.5 billion kilowatt hours (-7%) but is up year-on-year by 7.7 billion kilowatt hours (8%).
